enchantment.moreandmore.silence.desc: Makes the target unable to attack for 3 seconds,and grant the attacker a brief power effect.
advancements.moreandmore.hot_water.title: Heated Water
advancements.moreandmore.hot_water.descr: Turn a water bucket into a hot spring bucket via smelting.
enchantment.moreandmore.last_stand.desc: Consume 3 levels to negate lethal damage and gain Absorption,cooldown for 30 seconds.
Fire an explosive arrow that deals 10 times the damage of a normal arrow.
enchantment.moreandmore.frost_touch.desc: Freezes the target when attacking, some creatures are immune to this effect, and there is extra damage to fiery creatures.
